hero-banner.title: - Pet Project
hero-banner.description:
Dive deep into GitHub analytics. 
Search repositories, track trends, 
and explore code with a modern tech stack.

features.title: Powerful Search
features.description: Search repositories by language, stars, forks and other parameters

features.title: GitHub API Integration
features.description: Full access to GitHub data in real-time

features.title: Trending Projects
features.description: Stay updated with the most popular and fastest-growing repositories

features.title: Activity Analytics
features.description: Track commits, pull requests and developer activity

react.title: React 18+
react.description: Modern React with hooks, Suspense, Concurrent features and performance optimizations

typescript.title: TypeScript v5
typescript.description: Strict typing with full code coverage, advanced types, utility types and type guards

router.title: React Router DOM v6
router.description: Declarative routing with protected routes, lazy loading and nested routes

fsd.title: FSD (Feature-Sliced Design)
fsd.description: Scalable architecture with clear layer separation: app, pages, widgets, features, entities, shared

api-client.title: Type-safe API Client
api-client.description: Full GitHub API typing via @octokit/types, type guards, utility types

performance.title: Performance Optimization
performance.description: Virtualization, lazy loading, memoization, infinite scroll

design-system.title: Design System
design-system.description: Custom Ant Design v6 theme, dynamic theme switching, CSS-in-JS
